basic_details.job_title: DCPU Madhepura Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Madhepura (DCPU Madhepura)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Madhepura (DCPU Madhepura) Support Person Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website https://madhepura.nic.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Madhepura Support Person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age as on 01-06-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law, Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with three years experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate degree with Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling along with three years work experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://madhepura.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Madhepura Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Madhepura Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Madhepura Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Madhepura Support Person recruitment is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law. Alternatively, a Graduate degree with a Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling and three years of relevant work experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Support Person post is between 30 years and 65 years, as of 1st June 2026. No specific age relaxation details are provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Support Person post announced by the District Child Protection Unit Madhepura.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Support Person role is Rs. 9000 per case, which will be paid in installments as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Madhepura Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection process steps for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Support Person post will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Child Protection Unit Madhepura, located in Madhepura, Bihar.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Madhepura, which is https://madhepura.nic.in. Direct links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
